SocialHub.title: Isikhungo Sezindaba Zenhlalo
SocialHub.subtitle: Phatha ukuxhumana kwakho nezindaba zenhlalo.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Xhuma amakhasi akho nama-akhawunti ochwepheshe ukuze uthumele ngqo. Qinisekisa ukuthi i-akhawunti yakho yobungcweti ye-Instagram ixhunywe ekhasini le-Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Xhuma i-akhawunti yakho ye-TikTok ukuze uhlele futhi ushicilele amavidiyo ngqo.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Ukuhlanganiswa okuqondile ne-Instagram ne-TikTok njengamanje kusathuthukiswa futhi kuyagunyazwa yinkundla (i-Private Beta). Lesi sici sizokwethulwa esidlangalaleni maduze.

LandingPage.hero_description: Wonke umkhuzi udinga ikhampasi. Hhayi amathuluzi ahlakazekile. IRiveHub ihlanganisa imisebenzi yakho, ivikela inzuzo yakho, futhi izulazula abasebenzi bakho ngesiphithiphithi sesevisi yansuku zonke.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Ikhishi lokudlela elihle lobuchwepheshe elinethimba elisebenzayo
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: I-AI ihlaziya izingodo zakho zokushisa futhi iphakamise iziphakamiso zezinto ezingavamile, okufanele ziqinisekiswe yithimba lakho.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Ukufundwa okuhlakaniphile kwamanothi abasebenzi bakho abaphansi.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: I-interface iguqukela ngokushesha olimini lwendabuko lweqembu lakho lasekhishini.
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Ukuqhuba indawo yokudlela namuhla kufana nokuba umkhuzi womkhumbi edlula enkungwini - ngaphandle kwezinsimbi, uyaqagela.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: IRiveHub iyikhampasi ephendula ukungaqiniseki kube ukulungiswa kwenkambo.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_title: Khulisa ubuchwepheshe bakho - kuwo wonke amadekhi
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: IRiveHub ayithathi indawo yobuchwepheshe bakho - iyabukhulisa ngedatha futhi iyisakaze kuwo wonke amalungu eqembu ngezilimi ezingama-25. Azikho izithiyo emkhunjini.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Yonke iphuzu yedatha elahlekile ukuvuza ngaphansi komugqa wamanzi. I-sonar yeRiveHub iyenza ibonakale ngaphambi kokuba uthathe amanzi.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Uma ulinganisa kakhulu, yilapho umkhumbi wakho ufunda amanzi amaningi. Ubuhlakani bakho - hhayi obethu.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Usuku ngalunye olungenayo idatha ukumosha okungabonakali.
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Linganisa izindleko zokukhiqiza ngokweqile ngaphandle kwedatha ethembekile.
LandingPage.protocol_desc: I-IQ yekhishi lakho iyanda ngakho konke ukuxhumana.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Inkinobho eyodwa, futhi i-RiveHub iqala ukufunda isigqi sakho.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Ukuthengisa kwakho kwesikhathi esidlule kuba ukubikezela into ngayinye.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: Imizuzwana engama-30 yempendulo ngosuku futhi isistimu yakho ifinyelela ukunemba okungu-92%.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Hlola i-compressor bese ususa inyama ngokushesha.
LandingPage.features_card2_alert: Kutholwe isimo esiphuthumayo: Isiqandisi senyama ku-8°C.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Zitholele amathuluzi ethu amasha amane okuphathwa kwezindawo zokudlela okungenazinkinga.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Yakha amafomu akho okucwaninga ngokuswayipha. Ukuphepha kokudla ngokwezifiso, kusayinwe ngedijithali futhi akuguquki.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Ideshibhodi yoMpheki. Landelela ukucwaningwa kwamabhuku, khomba izinkinga zasekhishini futhi uthuthukise ukuqeqeshwa kweqembu lakho ngokubuka nje.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Unayo i-invoice? Thatha isithombe. I-Claude AI ikhipha ngokushesha ubuningi, amanani entengo nezithako. Valelisa ukufakwa kwedatha ngesandla.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Tshela amanothi akho okulungiselela nemiyalelo. I-Whisper V3 Turbo AI (eshesha ngendlela emangalisayo, enezilimi ezimbili) ibhala futhi ihlukanise yonke ithimba.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Khohlwa ngamanothi axegayo. Ukudluliselwa kwabasebenzi, iziphepho zemishini, nezigameko zabagibeli ziklanywa futhi zilandelwe yi-AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Ngena isiphepho semishini (isb., "Isiqandisi 2 siyavuza, kubizwe umakhenikha").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Dlulisela imiyalelo eqondile yokuzulazula eqenjini lakusihlwa.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Landelela izehlakalo zabagibeli (izivakashi) ukuze ulungise inkambo.
LandingPage.f2_title: Hlala Ukulungele Ukucwaningwa Kwamabhuku — Isibhakabhaka Esicacile Ngaphambili
LandingPage.f2_desc: Incwadi yakho yokungena, ezenzakalelayo. Kusukela emazingeni okushisa esiqandisini kuya emafutheni e-fryer, i-RiveHub ilandelela konke ukufundwa futhi imaka okungahambi kahle ngaphambi kokuba kube ama-reef ahlanzekile.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Isiqandisi sifinyelela ku-8°C: ukusikisela isenzo sokulungisa "Hlukanisa noma ulahle ukudla okuyingozi kakhulu".
LandingPage.f2_ex3: Izinqubo ze-HACCP ezibhaliwe uma kwenzeka ukuhlolwa.
LandingPage.f3_desc: Akukho zingqinamba zolimi ngaphakathi. Wonke amalungu eqembu ayingeni indawo yokuqondisa nemibhalo ngezilimi zawo.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Umpheki ubhala ngeSpanishi, umqashi ufunda ngesiBengali.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Amakhadi okupheka aqondakala ngokushesha kuwo wonke ama-opharetha amasha.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Izinqubo zokuphepha zitholakala kungakhathalekile ukuthi isisebenzi sivela kuphi.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Ihlanganiswe ngokwendalo nezinhlelo zakho ze-POS: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: I-Profit Radar yakho ixhuma kwi-POS yakho ukuze iqhathanise imali engenayo ngaleso sikhathi nezindleko zempahla ngesikhathi sangempela.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Ngenisa ngokuzenzakalelayo imali oyithola kwa-Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, noma Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Khomba izitsha "ezingamagugu" kanye "nezitsha ezingenamsebenzi" nge-Performance Matrix ehlakaniphile.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Uhlelo olungahambelani? I-AI ye-RiveHub ihlaziya futhi ingenise noma yikuphi ukuthekelisa kwe-CSV ngokwendalo.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Yeka ukubhala incwadi yohlu ngesandla. I-AI ikhipha ukudla, amanani, nezindleko kusuka kuma-slip okulethwa ukuze kugcinwe amashadi akho enembile.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Thatha isithombe se-invoyisi ecijanisiwe yomphakeli lapho kulethwa.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Ukukhishwa komugqa ngomugqa okuningiliziwe nezixwayiso zokuhlukahluka kwamanani ezithako.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Isibuyekezo esibukhoma nesizenzakalelayo se-Food Cost yezindlela zakho zokupheka.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Heha amakhasimende amasha ngokuthumela okuthakazelisayo okuveza amaphuzu avelele okupheka okukhiqizwe ngokuchofoza okukodwa.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Khiqiza umbhalo ohehayo wemenyu yoSuku Lwezithandani ngama-emoji aphelele.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Humusha ngokuzenzakalelayo okuthunyelwe kwakho ukuze uhehe amakhasimende aphesheya.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Dweba incazelo ekhangayo yezinkundla zakho zokulethwa (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Vumelanisa bonke abagibeli abangenayo kusuka ku-Libro, Resy, kanye ne-Zenchef. Ama-Webhook nokuvota okuzenzakalelayo kokubala amakhanda ngesikhathi sangempela.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Thola ukubhuka kwe-inthanethi ngokushesha ngaphandle kokufakwa ngesandla.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Hlanganisa izivakashi ezifike, ukukhansela, kanye nalabo abangaveli embukweni owodwa ophakathi.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Qhathanisa idatha yeklayenti ukuze ubikezele ivolumu yesevisi yakho.
LandingPage.f8_desc: I-Sonar Analysis iqhathanisa abagibeli bakho abafikayo, imali engenayo, namamephu ukuze ikhiqize inkambo yokulungiselela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Bala izilinganiso zesitsha ngasinye ngokusekelwe kubagibeli abaqinisekisiwe abaqondile.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Hlanganisa izithako ezingavuthiwe ezidingekayo ukuze usinde ohambweni oluzayo.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Linganisela inani eliphelele lempahla ngisho nangaphambi kokuthi uphakamise amaseyili.
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Zitholele imenyu ekhethekile yakusihlwa! I-tuna eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ethosiwe kahle... ✨ Ukubhuka ku-bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Umgogodla oqinile kanye ne-ecosystem yokwakha imisebenzi yakho yansuku zonke.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: I-Radar yakho Yenzuzo yokushaya izifundo ezitholisa kakhulu nemajini.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: I-Deep Profit Topography enezibikezelo zokuqondisa imikhumbi ngokuzimela.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Ukulandelela okunembile koketshezi. Phatha izivuno ze-keg, landelela idiphozi yengilazi ngokuhlukile, futhi usebenzise i-kanban ephelele yokukhiqiza utshwala.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Hlukanisa ngokushesha idiphozi yebhodlela ne-keg ezindlekweni zakho zangempela Zokudla.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Landelela ukulahleka okuqondile (ukuhlukahluka) phakathi kokuthengiswa kwe-POS nokubalwa komzimba kwempahla.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Phatha amaqoqo akho obhiya kusukela ekuvubeni kuya ekugqitshweni ngezivuno ezithile.
LandingPage.f10_desc: Funda umfutho womkhathi kuma-overhead akho. Ukusetshenziswa kukagesi namanzi kuboniswa nyanga zonke ukuze ukwazi ukunqamula izikebhe ngaphambi kokuba kufike inkokhelo.
LandingPage.f10_ex1: Landelela izitayela zokusetshenziswa kukagesi kwanyanga zonke.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Ukubukwa kwezindiza zokhozi zezinkokhelo zakho zezomnotho nama-algorithm anamandla okukhulisa inzuzo yakho. I-RiveHub iqhathanisa yonke idola elingena negremu ngalinye eliphuma.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.

CGU.title: Imigomo Yesevisi — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: I-RiveHub iyinkundla yesofthiwe-njengoba-iyisevisi (SaaS) eklanyelwe ukuthi **isize** abanikazi bezindawo zokudlela, abaphathi, kanye nochwepheshe bezinsiza zokudla emisebenzini yabo yansuku zonke ngamathuluzi anikwe amandla yi-AI kanye nemininingwane eqhutshwa yidatha. Isevisi iyatholakala ku-**rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Le nkundla inikeza, phakathi kwezinye, izici ezilandelayo:
CGU.s1_l1: **Ibhuku lokungenela ledijithali** — Ukungena kwamanothi wesevisi okunikezwe amandla yi-AI, ukuhlukaniswa okuzenzakalelayo, ukutholwa kokuphuthuma, neziphakamiso zesenzo sokulungisa
CGU.s1_l2: **Ukuqapha izinga lokushisa** — Ukuqoshwa, ukuhlaziywa kokuthambekela, nezincomo zesenzo sokulungisa ezithobela i-HACCP
CGU.s1_l3: **Ukuphathwa kwemenyu** — Ukudalwa kwemenyu, ukuhlelwa, nokushicilelwa ngokukhiqizwa kwekhodi ye-QR kanye nesizindalwana somphakathi
CGU.s1_l4: **Ukuhlaziywa kwezindleko zokudla** — Ukubalwa kwemajini okuzenzakalelayo ngesidlo ngasinye, ukuphathwa kwezithako nomphakeli, ukulandelela intengo, nezaziso zenzuzo
CGU.s1_l5: **Ubuchwepheshe bemenyu** — Ukuhlukaniswa kwento yemenyu ye-BCG-matrix (Inkanyezi, Ihange, Ukukhukhuleka, Idwala) nezincomo zamasu ezikhiqizwe yi-AI
CGU.s1_l6: **Ukuguqulwa kwamarisidi nama-invoice abe idijithali (OCR)** — Ukuqashelwa okubonakalayo okunikezwe amandla yimodeli yombono we-AI ukuze kukhishwe idatha kuma-invoice namarisidi
CGU.s1_l7: **Uhlu lokulungiselela oluhlakaniphile** — Ukukhiqizwa okuzenzakalelayo okusekelwe ekubhukheni, idatha yokuthengisa yomlando, nezindlela zokupheka
CGU.s1_l8: **Ukuphathwa kokubhukha** — Ukuvumelanisa kwamapulatifomu amaningi kanye nokubikezela ivolumu yezivakashi
CGU.s1_l9: **Isikhungo semidiya yezokuxhumana** — Ukukhiqizwa kokuqukethwe kwe-AI kwe-Instagram, Facebook, ne-TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Ukulandelela ukuhluka nokulahleka** — Ukuqhathanisa okwethiyori vs okwangempela, imibhalo yemfucuza, nezenzo zokulungisa
CGU.s1_l11: **Idiphozithi nokulandelela imali engenayo** — Ukuqoshwa kwemali engenayo yansuku zonke nokubuyisana kwebhange
CGU.s1_l12: **Ideshibhodi yezokubalwa kwezimali (Le Nid)** — Ubuhlakani bezezimali, ukulinganisela kwemajini yenetha, nokubonwa kwemali engenayo
CGU.s1_l13: **Ukulandelela izindleko zezinsiza** — Ukuqapha ukusetshenziswa kukagesi namanzi
CGU.s1_p3: I-RiveHub iyithuluzi **lokusekela izinqumo**. Ayithathi indawo yesinqumo sobuchwepheshe, ubuchwepheshe bomuntu, noma izibopho zomsebenzisi zokulawula ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo.
CGU.s2_p1: Kule migomo, amagama alandelayo anezincazelo ezibekwe ngezansi:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Inkundla ye-RiveHub efinyeleleka ku-rivehub.com, okuhlanganisa zonke izici zayo, ama-API, nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezihambisana nayo.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Noma yimuphi umuntu wemvelo noma osemthethweni odale i-akhawunti enkundleni futhi wamukele le migomo.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Indawo yokudlela ebhaliswe yi-Umsebenzisi ngaphakathi kweSevisi, eyakha indawo yokusebenza eyinhloko.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Imodeli yolwimi (LLM) nobuchwepheshe bembono yemodeli enikezwe abahlinzeki bezinkampani zangaphandle (ikakhulukazi i-Anthropic / Claude), ehlanganiswe neSevisi ukuze kuhlaziywe, kukhiqizwe okuqukethwe, futhi kukhishwe idatha.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Noma yikuphi ukuxhumana phakathi kweSevisi nenkundla yangaphandle (uhlelo lwe-POS, inkundla yokubhukha, inethiwekhi yokuxhumana nabantu) nge-API noma ama-webhook.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Ukuqashelwa kwezinhlamvu ezibonakalayo — ubuchwepheshe bokukhipha umbhalo nedatha ezithombeni zemibhalo.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Lonke ulwazi olufakiwe, olungenisiwe, noma olukhiqizwe uMsebenzisi ngaphakathi kweSayensi, okuhlanganisa amanothi, amamenyu, izindlela zokupheka, izithombe, ukuthengiselana, nokulungiselelwa.
CGU.s2_d8_def: Inkomba yezinombolo ebonisa izinga lokulinganisa nokuphelela kwedatha yendawo yokudlela ngaphakathi kwepulatifomu.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Ukufinyelela kwiSayensi kudinga ukudalwa kwe-akhawunti enekheli le-imeyili elivumelekile. UMsebenzisi uyavuma ukuhlinzeka ngemininingwane enembile futhi ayigcine isesikhathini.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: UMsebenzisi unomthwalo wemfanelo yedwa wokugcina izifakazelo zokungena ngemvume ziyimfihlo. Noma yimuphi umsebenzi owenziwa ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yoMsebenzisi kuthathwa njengowenziwe uMsebenzisi. Uma kwenzeka kusolwa ukuthi kulinyazwe, UMsebenzisi kumele azise i-RiveHub ngaphandle kokulibala.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Umnikazi we-akhawunti angamema amalungu eqembu ukuthi ajoyine indawo yokusebenzela yendawo yokudlela. Izindima ezitholakalayo yilezi:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Umnikazi** — Ukufinyelela okugcwele, ukuphathwa kokubhalisa, ukumema nokukhipha amalungu
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Umphathi** — Ukufinyelela kumamojula okusebenza nokulungiselelwa kwendawo yokudlela
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Ilungu leqembu** — Ukufunda nokufaka ukufinyelela ngokususelwa kumamojula anikwe amandla
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Umnikazi we-akhawunti unomthwalo wemfanelo ngezenzo ezenziwa ngamalungu eqembu ngaphakathi kweSayensi.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Isilingo samahhala sezinsuku ezingu-14 sinikezwa ngaphandle kwekhadi lesikweletu. Ngemuva kwalesi sikhathi, kudingeka ukubhaliswa okukhokhelwayo ukuze uqhubeke nokusebenzisa izici ze-premium. Idatha efakwe ngesikhathi sesilingo iyagcinwa.
CGU.s4_p1: I-RiveHub ivumela ukuxhumeka kumasevisi angaphandle ukuthuthukisa amakhono ayo. UMsebenzisi uyavuma ukuthi lokhu kuhlanganiswa kuncike kumasevisi aqhutshwa yizinkampani zangaphandle ezizimele.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Isevisi isekela ukuvumelanisa nezinhlelo ze-POS ezilandelayo:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Idatha yokuthengiselana engeniswe ngokusebenzisa lokhu kuhlanganiswa isetshenziselwa ukuhlaziywa kwezindleko zokudla, ubunjiniyela bemenyu, kanye nokubikezela ukulungiselela.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Idatha yokubhuka isetshenziselwa ukubikezela ivolumu yezivakashi kanye nokukhiqiza uhlu lokulungiselela.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Isevisi inika amandla ukuxhumeka kumapulatifomu alandelayo wokushicilela okuqukethwe:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: UMsebenzisi ugunyaza i-RiveHub ukuthi ishicilele okuqukethwe egameni labo kuphela ngemuva kokuvunywa okucacile kokushicilelwa ngakunye.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: I-RiveHub ngeke ibe nesibopho sokuphazamiseka, izinguquko ze-API, ukunganembi kwedatha, noma ukungasebenzi kahle okubangelwa amasevisi ezinkampani zangaphandle. UMsebenzisi unesibopho sokugcina izifakazelo zokuhlanganisa ezivumelekile nokuqinisekisa ukuvumelana kwedatha evumelanisiwe.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Isevisi ihlanganisa ubuchwepheshe bobuhlakani bokwenziwa (amamodeli e-LLM nawombono) ahlinzekwa ngabathengisi bezinkampani zangaphandle (Anthropic / Claude). Lobu buchwepheshe busetshenziselwa uku:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Hlaziya futhi uhlukanise amanothi esevisi yelogbook
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Phakamisa izenzo zokulungisa lapho kutholwa okungavamile (amazinga okushisa, imisebenzi)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Humusha okuqukethwe kuzo zonke izilimi ezisekelwayo (izilimi ezingu-25)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Khiqiza okuqukethwe kombhalo nezihlokwana zemithombo yezokuxhumana
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Khiqiza uhlu lokulungiselela ngokusekelwe kudatha yomlando neqagelwayo
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Hlaziya izindleko zokudla kanye nemajini yenzuzo
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Linganisela izinkomba zezezimali kudeshibhodi yokubala izimali
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Ukusikisela, ukuhlaziywa, nokuqukethwe okukhiqizwe ubuhlakani bokwenziwa obuhlanganiswe ku-RiveHub kunikezwa ngezinjongo zolwazi nezokubonisa kuphela.** Umsebenzisi uyavuma futhi uyemukela ukuthi:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Ukusikisela kwe-AI **akwakhi iseluleko sobuchwepheshe** ezindabeni zokuphepha kokudla, ukuthotshelwa kwemithetho, ukubala izimali, impilo yomphakathi, nanoma iyiphi enye indlela.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Ukusikisela kwe-AI **akuthathi indawo** yesinqumo sochwepheshe oqeqeshiwe (umhloli wezempilo, umgcini-zincwadi oqinisekisiwe, isazi sokupheka).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: I-AI ingase ikhiqize **imiphumela enganembile, engaphelele, noma engafanele** ngenxa yemvelo yezibalo zezinhlobo zezilimi.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Umthwalo wokugcina wazo zonke izinqumo zokusebenza**— okuhlanganisa izenzo zokulungisa, izinqumo zezezimali, ukushicilelwa kokuqukethwe, nezinyathelo zokuthotshelwa — **uhlala kuMsebenzisi kuphela**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: I-RiveHub **ayinikezi isiqinisekiso sokuthotshelwa kwemithetho** kwesikhungo. Isevisi yakhelwe *ukusiza* ukuphatha, hhayi ukuyiqinisekisa.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Qinisekisa futhi uqinisekise** konke ukusikisela okukhiqizwe yi-AI ngaphambi kokukusebenzisa emisebenzini
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Ungathembi ngokuphelele** ukusikisela kwe-AI ngezinqumo ezithinta ukuphepha kokudla, impilo yomphakathi, noma isimo sezezimali sesikhungo
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Gcina amakhono okuqeqeshwa nezokuqeqesha** adingekayo kubasebenzi, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi iServisi isetshenziswa kangakanani
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Bika** noma yikuphi ukusikisela okungafanele noma okungase kube yingozi eqenjini le-RiveHub nge-fomu yokusekela
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Ukuhumusha okukhiqizwe yi-AI kunikezwa ngenjongo yereferensi kuphela. I-RiveHub ayiqinisekisi ukunemba, ukuphelela, noma ukufaneleka kokuhumusha, ikakhulukazi ekuxhumaneni okuhlobene nokuphepha. Abasebenzisi bayakhuthazwa ukuthi babe nemiyalelo ebalulekile eqinisekiswe isikhulumi somdabu esiqeqeshiwe.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Idatha ekhishwe ngokuzenzakalelayo ezithombeni (amarisidi, ama-invoyisi) ingase ibe namaphutha. Umsebenzisi unesibopho sokuqinisekisa ukunemba kwamanani, izinsuku, amagama abahlinzeki, nenye idatha ekhishiwe ngaphambi kokuyihlanganisa ekubalweni kwezimali noma emisebenzini.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Isikolo Sobuhlakani siyinkomba yangaphakathi ebonisa ukuphelela kwedatha efakwe kwiServisi. Akusona isilinganiso sangempela sokusebenza kwesikhungo futhi akufanele sichazwe njengokucwaningwa noma ukuhlolwa kochwepheshe.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Isevisi iqhuba imisebenzi ezenzakalelayo ngezikhathi ezithile, okuhlanganisa:
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Lokhu kuzenzakalela kusebenza ngemuva futhi kungathinteka ukutholakala kwesevisi yenkampani yangaphandle. Umsebenzisi akufanele athembele ngokuphelele emiphumeleni ezenzakalelayo ngaphandle kokuqinisekiswa.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Izinhlaka zokushicilela ezikhiqizwe yi-AI (amagama-ncazo, ama-hashtag, ukufometha) ziyiziphakamiso ezidinga ukubuyekezwa koMsebenzisi ngaphambi kokushicilela. I-RiveHub iyazikhulula zonke izikweletu ngokuqukethwe okushicilelwe uMsebenzisi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ngisho noma bekuqale kwasikiselwa yiServisi.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: I-RiveHub iqoqa futhi icubungule idatha yomuntu siqu ngokuhambisana ne-Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) yaseCanada, i-Act yaseQuebec ephathelene nokuvikelwa kolwazi lomuntu siqu emkhakheni ozimele (Umthetho 25), futhi, lapho kufanele khona, i-General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) ye-European Union.
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Isevisi iqoqa futhi icubungule izigaba ezilandelayo zedatha:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Idatha yokukhomba** — Igama, ikheli le-imeyili, ulwazi lwesikhungo
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Idatha yokusebenza** — Amanothi esevisi, ukufundwa kwezinga lokushisa, amamenyu, izindlela zokupheka, izithako
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Idatha yezezimali** — Izindleko zezithako, ama-margins, idiphozithi, imali engenayo yansuku zonke, ama-invoyisi afakwe ngedijithali
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Idatha yokubhuka** — Imithamo yekhava, izikhala zesikhathi, amazinga okukhansela (avunyelaniswe kumapulatifomu ezinkampani zangaphandle)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Idatha yokuthengiselana** — Ukuthengisa ngento ngayinye, izindlela zokukhokha (ezivunyelaniswe kusuka kumasistimu e-POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Idatha yokulahlekelwa** — Amarekhodi okuhlukahluka, imfucuza, nokungafani kokusungula
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Okuqukethwe kwe-multimedia** — Izithombe zezitsha, izithombe zamarisidi nama-invoyisi
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Idatha yokusetshenziswa** — Ukuxhumana kwesevisi, izintandokazi zolimi, izingodo zokuxhumana
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Idatha Yomsebenzisi igcinwe ngokuvikelekile kwizingqalasizinda zefu zeSupabase (Amazon Web Services). Idatha ibethelwa ngesikhathi iphumule nangendlela ehanjisiwe. Isakhiwo esinezinhlaka eziningi siqinisekisa ukuhlukaniswa kwedatha phakathi kwezikhungo.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Enye idatha idluliselwa ezinsizakalweni ze-AI zangaphandle (Anthropic) ukuze icutshungulwe (ukuhlaziywa kwamanothi, i-OCR, ukukhiqizwa kokuqukethwe). I-RiveHub izibophezela ekunciphiseni idatha yomuntu siqu edlulisiwe nokusebenzisa kuphela idatha edingekayo kakhulu ekucubungulweni okuceliwe. Lokhu kudluliselwa kungaphansi kwezinqubomgomo zobumfihlo zabahlinzeki abafanelekile.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Idatha evumelaniswe isuka kuzinhlelo ze-POS, izinkundla zokubhuka, kanye nezinkundla zokuxhumana igeleza nge-API zalezo zinsiza. I-RiveHub ifinyelela kuphela idatha edingekayo ekusebenzeni kwamamojula avunyelwe futhi ayigcini imininingwane yokukhokha yamakhasimende okugcina ezindawo zokudlela.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: Ngokuhambisana nomthetho osebenzayo, uMsebenzisi unamalungelo alandelayo:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Ilungelo lokufinyelela** — Thola ikhophi yedatha yomuntu siqu
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Ilungelo lokulungisa** — Lungisa idatha enganembile noma engaphelele
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Ilungelo lokususwa** — Cela ukususwa kwedatha yomuntu siqu
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Ilungelo lokuthutha** — Thola idatha ngohlelo oluhlelekile, olufundeka ngomshini
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Ilungelo lokuphikisa** — Phikisa ukucutshungulwa kwedatha ngezinhloso ezithile
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Ilungelo lokuhoxisa imvume** — Hoxisa imvume yokucutshungulwa nganoma yisiphi isikhathi
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Ukuze usebenzise la malungelo, uMsebenzisi angaxhumana ne-RiveHub ekhelini eliboniswe esigabeni 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Idatha Yomsebenzisi igcinwa isikhathi sokubhalisa esisebenzayo kanye nenkathi yezinsuku ezingu-30 ngemuva kokunqanyulwa, ukuvumela ukuthunyelwa kwedatha. Ngemuva kwalesi sikhathi, idatha isuswa unomphela, ngaphandle uma kudingeka ngokomthetho ukuthi igcinwe.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: UMsebenzisi ugcina ubunikazi obugcwele bayo yonke idatha efakiwe, engenisiwe, noma ekhiqizwe ngaphakathi kweNkonzo. I-RiveHub ayitholi amalungelo obunikazi phezu kweDatha Yomsebenzisi.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Isevisi ye-RiveHub, kufaka phakathi ikhodi yayo yomthombo, ukwakheka, ama-algorithm, imibhalo, nomkhiqizo, ivikelwe yimithetho yempahla yengqondo yaseCanada neyamazwe ngamazwe. Akukho kulawa magama okunikeza uMsebenzisi noma yimaphi amalungelo phezu kwalezi zinto, ngaphandle kwelungelo lokusebenzisa ngaphakathi kwesilinganiso sokubhalisa.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: UMsebenzisi ugcina wonke amalungelo kokuqukethwe okufakwe ku-Service (amanothi, amamenyu, izindlela zokupheka, izithombe, idatha yezezimali). UMsebenzisi unikeza i-RiveHub ilayisensi elinganiselwe, elingelona elikhethekile, elihoxisekayo lokucubungula lokhu okuqukethwe kuphela ngenhloso yokuhlinzeka ngeSevisi.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Okuqukethwe okukhiqizwe yi-AI ngesicelo soMsebenzisi (okuthunyelwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, izifinyezo, izinguqulo, izincomo) kwenziwa kutholakale kuMsebenzisi ukuze asetshenziswe kwezentengiselwano ngaphandle komkhawulo. I-RiveHub ayifuni amalungelo empahla yengqondo phezu kwalokho okuqukethwe.
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Mahhala** — Ilogi, umhleli wemenyu, ukuhunyushwa kwezilimi eziningi, isikhungo sezindaba zomphakathi
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Essence** — Izici zamahhala + ukuhlaziywa kwezindleko zokudla, idiphozi, ubunjiniyela bemenyu
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Performance** — Izici ze-Essence + uhlu lokulungiselela, ukubhuka, ukulandelelwa kokuhlukahluka
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Intelligence** — Izici ze-Performance + ideshibhodi yokubalwa kwezimali, i-AI ethuthukisiwe, izindleko zokusetshenziswa
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Enterprise** — Izici ze-Intelligence + ukuphathwa kwezindawo eziningi, ukwesekwa okuzinikele, ukwenza ngokwezifiso
CGU.s8_s1_p2: I-RiveHub inelungelo lokushintsha okuqukethwe kwezinga lokubhalisa. Noma yiziphi izinguquko ezithinta izici ezifakwe ezingeni elibhalisiwe zizoxhunyanwa ngesaziso sezinsuku ezingama-30.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Okubhaliselwe kukhokhiswa njalo ngenyanga noma minyaka yonke ngokukhetha koMsebenzisi, ngenkundla yokukhokha evikelekile i-Stripe. Amanani aboniswa ngamadola aseCanada (CAD) ngaphandle uma kushiwo ngenye indlela. Izintela ezisebenzayo zengezwa enanini elibonisiwe.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Okubhaliselwe kwanyanga zonke akubuyiswa imali ngesikhathi samanje. Kokubhaliselwe kwaminyaka yonke, isicelo sokubuyiselwa imali esilinganiselwe singacelwa ezinsukwini eziyi-14 zokuvuselelwa. Ngaphandle kwalesi sikhathi, akukho ukubuyiselwa imali okuzonikezwa.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: UMsebenzisi angashintsha izinga lokubhalisa nganoma yisiphi isikhathi kuzilungiselelo ze-akhawunti. Ukuthuthukisa kuqala ukusebenza ngokushesha. Ukwehlisa kuqala ukusebenza ekuqaleni kwenkathi yokukhokha elandelayo, ngokufinyelela okuqhubekayo ezicini zezinga eliphakeme kuze kube yileso sikhathi.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Isevisi inikezwa "njengoba injalo" futhi "njengoba itholakala." I-RiveHub ayiqinisekisi ukuthi iSevisi ngeke ibe namaphutha, ingaphazanyiswa, ivikelekile, noma ifanele ngenhloso ethile.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Akukho ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo lapho i-RiveHub, izikhulu zayo, abasebenzi bayo, noma osonkontileka bayo bangabanjwa ukuthi banesibopho se:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Ukulahleka kwezezimali okubangelwa idatha enganembile ekhiqizwe yi-AI noma ekhishwe nge-OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Izinhlawulo zokulawula ezibangelwa ukuthembela ngokweqile kuziphakamiso zeSevisi
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Ukulahlekelwa kokudla noma kokusebenza okuhlobene nezincomo ze-AI
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Ukunganembi kwedatha evumelaniswe kusuka ekuhlanganisweni kwabantu besithathu (i-POS, ukubhuka)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Okuqukethwe okushicilelwe nguMsebenzisi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, noma ngabe kukhiqizwe yiSevisi
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Ukuphazamiseka kwesevisi okubangelwa abantu besithathu (umgcini, abahlinzeki be-AI, izinkundla ezihlanganisiwe)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Isibopho esiphelele se-RiveHub kuMsebenzisi silinganiselwe ezimalini zokubhalisa ezikhokhwe ngempela nguMsebenzisi phakathi **nezinyanga eziyishumi nambili (12)** ezedlule umcimbi obangele isimangalo.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: I-RiveHub ngeke ibe nesibopho sanoma yikuphi ukwehluleka okubangelwa amandla amakhulu, okuhlanganisa ngaphandle komkhawulo: izinhlekelele zemvelo, ubhubhane, izingxabano, ukuphazamiseka kwengqalasizinda ye-inthanethi, ukwehluleka komhlinzeki wezinkampani zangaphandle, noma izenzo zikahulumeni.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Umsebenzisi angakhansela ukubhalisa kwabo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokusebenzisa izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti noma ingosi yokukhokha ye-Stripe. Ukukhansela kuqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwenkathi yokukhokha yamanje.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: I-RiveHub inelungelo lokumisa noma lokunqamula ukufinyelela koMsebenzisi uma kwenzeka kwephulwa le migomo, ukusetshenziswa kabi kweNkonzo, ukungakhokhi okuqhubekayo, nanoma yimuphi umsebenzi okungenzeka ulimaze iNkonzo noma abanye abasebenzisi. Umsebenzisi uzokwaziswa nge-imeyili ngaphambi kokunqanyulwa, ngaphandle kwezimo eziphuthumayo.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Lapho kunqanyulwa, uMsebenzisi unenkathi yezinsuku **ezingama-30** yokuthekelisa idatha yabo besebenzisa amathuluzi okuthekelisa eNkonzo. Ngemuva kwalesi sikhathi, idatha izosuswa ngokuhambisana nesigaba 6.7. I-RiveHub izibophezela ekunikezeni idatha ngefomethi ehlelekile, efundeka ngomshini (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Lapho kunqanyulwa, konke ukuhlanganiswa kwenkampani yangaphandle (izinhlelo ze-POS, ukubhukha, inkundla yezokuxhumana) kunqanyulwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Amathokheni okugunyazwa kwe-OAuth ayahoxiswa. Umsebenzisi unesibopho sokuqinisekisa ukuthi ukuxhumana kususiwe kahle ngezinsizakalo ezifanele zenkampani yangaphandle.
CGU.s11_p1: I-RiveHub inelungelo lokuguqula le migomo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi. Abasebenzisi bazokwaziswa nganoma yiziphi izinguquko ezinkulu nge-imeyili nangesaziso esingaphakathi nohlelo, okungenani isaziso **sezinsuku eziyi-15** ngaphambi kokuthi imigomo emisha iqale ukusebenza.
CGU.s11_p2: Ukuqhubeka nokusebenzisa iNkonzo ngemuva kokuthi imigomo emisha iqale ukusebenza kusho ukwamukela imigomo eguquliwe.
CGU.s11_p3: Uma uMsebenzisi engavumelani nezinguquko, bangakhansela ukubhalisa kwabo ngokuhambisana nesigaba 10 ngaphambi kokuthi imigomo emisha iqale ukusebenza.
CGU.s12_p1: Le migomo ilawulwa yimithetho yePhrovinsi yaseQuebec kanye nemithetho yenhlangano yaseCanada esebenza lapho.
CGU.s12_p2: Noma yikuphi ukuphikisana okuvela kule migomo noma ukusetshenziswa kweNkonzo kuzothunyelwa kububanzi obukhethekile bezinkantolo zePhrovinsi yaseQuebec, iSifunda saseMontreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Uma kwenzeka kuba nokuphikisana, amaqembu ayavuma ukuzama ukuxazulula ngobungani ngokwethembeka ngaphambi kokuthatha izinyathelo zomthetho.
CGU.s13_p1: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nale migomo, ukuvikelwa kwedatha yakho, noma ukusebenza kweNkonzo, sicela usithinte ku: **support@rivehub.com**

Meta.home_title: I-RiveHub — Isofthiwe Yokuphatha Indawo Yokudlela Enikwe Amandla yi-AI
Meta.home_description: Ipulatifomu yokuphatha indawo yokudlela ene-AI: ukuthobela kwe-HACCP, ilogbook ehlakaniphile, ukuhlaziywa kwezindleko zokudla, isithwebuli se-invoyisi se-OCR, ubunjiniyela bemenyu, ukuhlanganiswa kwe-POS, ukuhumusha ngezilimi ezingama-25. Inguqulo yamahhala iyatholakala.
Meta.pricing_title: Amanani Nezidla — Isofthiwe Yokuphatha Indawo Yokudlela ye-RiveHub
Meta.pricing_description: Okubhaliselwe kwe-RiveHub kusuka ku-$59/ngenyanga. Ilogbook ye-AI, ukuthobela kwe-HACCP, ukulandelela izindleko zokudla, ukuhlanganiswa kwe-POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed), ukuhumusha ngezilimi ezingama-25. Uhlelo lwamahhala, akukho khadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.
Meta.cgu_description: Imigomo yesevisi ye-RiveHub, inkundla yokuphatha indawo yokudlela enikwe amandla yi-AI. Inqubomgomo ye-AI, ukuvikelwa kwedatha, ukuhlanganiswa kwenkampani yangaphandle, nezibopho zobumfihlo.
Meta.ai_page_description: Zitholele ukuthi i-AI yokuphatha indawo yokudlela yenza kanjani ngokuzenzakalelayo izindleko zokudla, ukuthobela kwe-HACCP, ubunjiniyela bemenyu, kanye nokusebenza kwansuku zonke. Inkundla yokudlela yamahhala ye-AI — akukho khadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.

AIPage.meta_description: Zitholele ukuthi i-AI yokuphatha indawo yokudlela yenza kanjani ngokuzenzakalelayo izindleko zokudla, ukuthobela kwe-HACCP, ubunjiniyela bemenyu, kanye nokusebenza kwansuku zonke. Inkundla yokudlela yamahhala ye-AI — akukho khadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.
AIPage.hero_description: I-RiveHub isebenzisa ubuhlakani bokwenziwa ukwenza ngokuzenzakalelayo ukulandelela izindleko zokudla, ukuthobela kwe-HACCP, ubunjiniyela bemenyu, nezinqumo zokusebenza — ukuze ukwazi ukugxila ekungeniseni izihambi, hhayi amashidi okubala.
AIPage.what_title: Yini i-AI engayenzela indawo yakho yokudlela?
AIPage.what_description: I-AI yokuphatha indawo yokudlela ithatha izinqubo zokwenza ngesandla ngezinto ezenziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ezihlakaniphile. Kusukela ekuskeneni ama-invoyisi kuya ekubikezeleni izidingo zokulungiselela, nakhu ukuthi i-AI iguqula kanjani ukusebenza kwansuku zonke.
AIPage.f1_desc: I-AI ihlaziya amaphethini esevisi, izingodo zamazinga okushisa, namanothi ezisebenzi ukuze iveze imininingwane engenziwa — ithatha izingodo zephepha ngerekhodi elihlakaniphile, eliseshekayo.
AIPage.f2_desc: I-AI iqapha izindawo zokuhlola ukuthobela, ifulegi okungenayo okulahlekile, futhi ikhiqiza imibiko elungele ukucwaningwa — igcina indawo yakho yokudlela iphephile futhi ilungele ukuhlolwa.
AIPage.f3_desc: Landelela izindleko zezithako, thola izinto ezingavamile zentengo, futhi ubala inzuzo yangempela ngesitsha ngasinye — kufaka phakathi izisebenzi. I-AI iyakwazisa ngaphambi kokuthi izindleko ziphume esandleni.
AIPage.f4_desc: Thatha isithombe noma ulayishe i-PDF. I-AI ikhipha yonke into yomugqa, umkhiqizo, ubuningi, nentengo — iguqula amahora okufaka idatha abe imizuzwana.
AIPage.f5_desc: Thola izitsha zakho ezinenzuzo enkulu ngokuhlaziywa kwematriki ye-BCG. I-AI incoma izinguquko zemenyu ngokususelwa ezindlekweni zokudla, ekudumeni, kanye nedatha yemajini.
AIPage.f6_desc: I-AI ihumusha imiyalelo yomsebenzi, izinhlu zokuhlola, namamenyu amaqembu ezilimi eziningi — iqinisekisa ukuthi ilungu ngalinye leqembu liwuqonda ngokuphelele umsebenzi walo.
AIPage.why_description: Izindawo zokudlela ezisebenzisa i-AI ekuphathweni zibika izinqumo ezisheshayo, imfucuza yokudla ephansi, nokuthobela okuqinile. Nakhu okushintshayo lapho uyeka ukuqagela bese uqala ukwazi.
AIPage.b1_desc: I-AI isebenza ngokuzenzakalelayo ukucubungula ama-invoice, ukugawula ukuthotshelwa, nokubala izindleko obekuthatha ukushintshashintsha konke. Ithimba lakho lisebenzisa isikhathi esincane emaphepheni nesikhathi esiningi ekusebenzeni.
AIPage.b2_desc: Ukulandelelwa kwezindleko zesikhathi sangempela nokutholwa kwemfucuza kusiza izindawo zokudlela ukukhomba nokuqeda ukulahlekelwa okufihliwe — ngokuvamile zikhokhela isikhulumi ngenyanga yokuqala.
AIPage.b3_desc: Ukuqapha okuqhubekayo kwe-HACCP kusho ukuthi awusoze washesha ngaphambi kokuhlolwa. I-AI igcina amarekhodi akho okuthotshelwa ephelele, enembile, futhi afinyeleleka ngokushesha.
AIPage.how_title: I-RiveHub isebenzisa kanjani i-AI endaweni yakho yokudlela
AIPage.how_description: I-RiveHub ayiyona ithuluzi elijwayelekile eline-AI elixhunywe kulo. Isici ngasinye siklanyelwe indlela izindawo zokudlela ezisebenza ngayo ngempela — kusukela ekhishini kuya phambili kwendlu.
AIPage.step1_desc: Xhumanisa i-POS yakho (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), layisha ama-invoice, futhi umeme ithimba lakho. Ukusetha kuthatha ngaphansi kwemizuzu engu-15.
AIPage.step2_desc: Emahoreni angama-48, i-AI ye-RiveHub iqonda isakhiwo sezindleko zakho, amaphethini wensizakalo, nemikhuba yokuthobela — futhi iqala ukuletha imininingwane.
AIPage.step3_desc: Izaziso zansuku zonke mayelana nokungahambi kahle kwezindleko zokudla, imibiko yokuthobela ezenzakalelayo, amazinga wenzuzo yemenyu, kanye nohlu lokulungiselela olubikezelayo — konke ngaphandle kokufaka mathupha.
AIPage.step4_desc: Njengoba indawo yakho yokudlela ikhula, i-AI ilinganisa nawe — iphatha izindawo eziningi, amalungu amasha eqembu, kanye nokwanda kobunzima ngaphandle kokunye okungaphezulu.
AIPage.cta_title: Ukulungele ukuletha i-AI endaweni yakho yokudlela?
AIPage.cta_description: Joyina izindawo zokudlela emhlabeni wonke ezisebenzisa i-RiveHub ukwenza imisebenzi ngokuzenzakalela, ukunciphisa izindleko, nokuhlala zithobela — okunikezwe amandla ubuhlakani bokwenziwa.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Akukho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo. Uhlelo lwamahhala, kuze kube phakade.

HowItWorks.subtitle: Izinyathelo ezintathu zokulawula imisebenzi yakho
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Xhumanisa i-POS yakho, abahlinzeki, nama-invoyisi. Mema ithimba lakho — ilungu ngalinye ligibela ngolimi lwabo. I-RiveHub ihlanganisa ngokwendabuko ne-Toast, i-Square, i-Lightspeed, nokunye.

FAQ.title: Imibuzo ebuzwa njalo
FAQ.subtitle: Konke odinga ukukwazi ngaphambi kokuqala
FAQ.q1_q: I-RiveHub ihlanganisa kanjani nesistimu yami ye-POS?
FAQ.q1_a: I-RiveHub ixhuma ngokwemvelo nezinhlelo ezinkulu ze-POS ezihlanganisa i-Toast, i-Square, i-SumUp, i-Lightspeed, ne-Zettle. Ukusetha kuthatha imizuzu engaphansi kwemi-5 - vele ugunyaze ukuxhumana futhi idatha yakho iqala ukuvumelanisa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
FAQ.q2_a: Impela. Yonke idatha ibethelwa ngesikhathi sokuhamba nalapho iphumule. Sisebenzisa ingqalasizinda ye-Supabase ngokuvikeleka kwezinga lelayini, okusho ukuthi idatha yakho ihlukanisiwe futhi ifinyeleleka kuphela eqenjini lakho. Asikaze sabelane noma sithengise idatha yakho.
FAQ.q3_a: Izindawo zokudlela eziningi zisebenza ngokugcwele phakathi nemizuzu eyi-15. Xhuma i-POS yakho, mema ithimba lakho, futhi i-RiveHub iqala ukufunda amaphethini akho ngokushesha. Uzothola imininingwane yakho yokuqala ongayithatha ngaphakathi kwamahora angama-48.
FAQ.q4_a: Uhlelo lwamahhala lwe-Essence alunamingcele yesikhathi - lusebenzise isikhathi eside ngendlela ofuna ngayo. Uma usukulungele izici ze-AI ezithuthukisiwe njengoku-oda okubikezelayo nokuthobela imithetho okuzenzakalelayo, thuthukela ku-Horizon noma ku-Intelligence nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.
FAQ.q5_q: Ithimba lami lingayisebenzisa i-RiveHub ngolimi lwabo?
FAQ.q5_a: Yebo. I-RiveHub isekela izilimi nezilimi ezingu-25 - kusukela kwelesiFulentshi nelesiNgisi kuya kwelesiBengali, isiKabyle nelesiCantonese. Yonke imisebenzi, ikhadi leresiphi nenqubo yokuphepha ihunyushwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ilungu ngalinye lethimba. Ayikho imigoqo yolimi emkhunjini.
FAQ.q6_a: I-RiveHub yakhelwe ukuthi ibe lula ukuyisebenzisa. Isixhumanisi sincane futhi sigxile emsebenzini - ithimba lakho lingaqala ukusisebenzisa ngokushesha. Siphinde sinikeze ngemihlahlandlela yokungenisa abantu emsebenzini futhi ithimba lethu lokusekela liyatholakala nge-chat nganoma yimiphi imibuzo.
FAQ.q7_q: I-RiveHub iphatha kanjani ukuthobela imithetho ye-HACCP?
FAQ.q7_a: I-RiveHub isebenza njengencwadi yakho yokubhalela ezenzakalelayo. Ukuhlolwa kwezinga lokushisa kwansuku zonke, ukushintsha amafutha, kanye nemiyalelo yabasebenzi kugeleza ngokwemvelo kumashadi wokuthobela imithetho akulungele ukuhlolwa ngaphandle kwamaphepha engeziwe.

NauticalCommandCenter.title: Indawo Yakho Yokudlela Ingumkhumbi
NauticalCommandCenter.subtitle: Wonke umphathi udinga amathuluzi. Hhayi amathuluzi ahlakazekile.
NauticalCommandCenter.desc: Uzihambela ngamabalazwe angaphelele. Abahlinzeki bashintsha izintengo. Abasebenzi bakhuluma izilimi ezahlukene. Abahloli bezempilo bafika ngaphandle kwesaziso.
NauticalCommandCenter.d1: Ukwehla kwamandla emali okungabonakali (abahlinzeki bakhuphuka ngamasenti)
NauticalCommandCenter.p1_subtitle: Ideshibhodi eyodwa ehlangene. Amathuluzi amathathu abalulekile.
NauticalCommandCenter.p1_desc: I-RiveHub ihlanganisa lokho obekuyithuluzi elihlukene elintathu libe yisikhungo esisodwa somyalo - ngoba umphathi akasebenzisi i-sextant, i-barometer, nekhampasi ngokuhlukana.
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_subtitle: Izaziso ngaphambi kwesiphepho. Izinyathelo ngaphambi kokuvuza.
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_desc: Ukwehla kwenzuzo? Ukulungiselela izembozo ezingu-47? Isexwayiso seqophelo lokushisa? Uyakubona. Ithimba lakho liyakubona. Ngolimi lwabo.
NauticalCommandCenter.feed1_desc: Isenzo: Hlukanisa noma ulahle ukudla okuyingozi kakhulu
NauticalCommandCenter.score_subtitle: Ukusuka esiyaluyalwini semininingwane kuya ekulinganisweni kochwepheshe.
NauticalCommandCenter.score_desc: Awudingi ukuphelela ngosuku lokuqala. Yakha ubuhlakani kancane kancane.
NauticalCommandCenter.iq_desc_2: isigaba. Xhuma i-POS yakho ukuze uvule ama-algorithm abikezelayo. Imizuzwana engama-30 nje yempendulo yansuku zonke ikufikisa ekunembeni okungu-95%.

ThreePillarsDemo.subtitle: Njengoba ukapteni edinga isikhungo esisodwa sokulawula (hhayi i-sextant, ibharometer, KANYE nekhampasi ngokwehlukana), udinga ideshibhodi eyodwa ehlangene Yemajini, Abasebenzi, kanye Nokuthobela Imithetho.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_prob: Abahlinzeki bakho baphakamise amanani ngo-$0.50/kg. Ukuthole ekupheleni kwenyanga ngesikhathi sokubalwa kwempahla.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_sol: Isithwebuli se-invoice se-OCR sithola ukushintsha kwentengo ngokushesha. Ngokuzayo, uzokwazi ngemizuzwana emi-5.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b1: Thola ukwehla kwamandla emali yabahlinzeki ngaphambi kokuba kubulale inzuzo yakho
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b2: Yazi Izindleko Zakho Zokudla zangempela ngesikhathi sangempela (hhayi ukuqagela)
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_tip: I-ROI yangempela. Ukonga kwangempela. Idatha yangempela.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_prob: Umpheki wakho ongaphansi ukhuluma isiFulentshi. Umkhuhli wezitsha ukhuluma isiBengali. Imiyalo yokuphepha iyalahleka ekuhumusheni.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_sol: Yonke iresiphi, yonke inqubo, zonke izexwayiso — ngolimi lwabo lwendabuko. Ngokuzenzakalelayo.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b1: Izilimi ezingama-25 ziyasekelwa (isiFulentshi, iSpanishi, isiBengali, isiCantonese, njll.)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b2: Amakhadi eresiphi aqondwa yibo bonke abasebenzi abasha, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi bavela kuphi
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b3: Yehlisa isikhathi sokuqeqesha ngo-40% (akukho sidingo solimi)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_tip: Iresiphi eyodwa. Izilimi ezinhlanu. Ukucaca okusheshayo.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_prob: Ama-log e-HACCP enziwa ngesandla. Ukuhlolwa kwezinga lokushisa okusabalele. Umhloli uyafika, uyahlukumezeka.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_sol: Ama-log e-HACCP azibhala wona. Ukuthobela umthetho kukhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo emisebenzini yansuku zonke.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_b1: Ukuqapha izinga lokushisa → amarekhodi e-HACCP alogwa ngokuzenzakalelayo
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_b3: Ama-log okuqeqesha abasebenzi → amarekhodi ezitifiketi (umkhiqizo oseceleni)
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_b4: Ukulungele ukuhlolwa 24/7. Ukulungiselela ukucwaninga okushesha ngo-60%.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_demo: Uhlu lokuhlola oluphelele lokuhlolwa ngemizuzu emi-2
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_bad_end: Okubhaliselwe okuthathu, ukungena ngemvume okuthathu, ama-silo edatha amathathu
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_1: Ikhampasi Yenzuzo → Isichazamazwi Sabasebenzi → Amashadi Okuthobela Imigomo
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_2: Ukungena ngemvume kanye, ideshibhodi eyodwa, umthombo owodwa ohlanganisiwe weqiniso
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_3: Ukusebenza nedatha kugelezela kumarekhodi okuthobela imigomo ngokuzenzakalela
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_end: Ukwaneliseka kwabasebenzi + Ukulawula Inzuzo + Ukulungela Ukuhlolwa. Kuthebhu eyodwa.
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_start: I-RiveHub ayiwona amathuluzi amathathu ahlanganiswe ndawonye. Yi-
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_end: lapho idatha yenzuzo, ukuxhumana kwabasebenzi, kanye nemibhalo yokuthobela imigomo kugelezela ndawonye ngokwemvelo.
ThreePillarsDemo.cta_desc: Khetha indlela yakho. Qala ku-Intelligence Score yakho yamanje. Yakha ngokuqhubekayo. I-RiveHub ikhula ngokuvuthwa kwedatha yekhishi lakho.
